title: Mike Roberts
compiled_truth: Mike Roberts is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2001-05-30), Mike Roberts sent 48 and received 429 emails, totalling 477 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (47), [Jose Marquez](people/jose-marquez) (9), [Stephen Bennett](people/stephen-bennett) (8), [Kevin Moore](people/kevin-moore) (7), [Joseph Hrgovcic](people/joseph-hrgovcic) (7).
